subject: Amazu's Inkcaster — an ornate magical staff or wand with a jeweled top, partially wrapped in purple cloth, set against a warm rocky landscape
description: A decorative magical staff or wand is depicted diagonally against a warm reddish-gold background of rocky or cave terrain. The staff has a jeweled head — a teal or green rounded gem set in an ornate golden fitting — and is partially wrapped with purple fabric or ribbon near the base. The staff's design reads as a navigator's or explorer's tool, something that might point directions rather than fire spells. The background glow suggests cave rock or canyon walls lit from below or from the side. The composition is an item-forward portrait with no figures present.
foreground: Ornate magical staff with teal gem top and purple fabric wrapping
background: Warm rocky cave or canyon terrain, reddish-gold glow
emotion: purposeful artifact energy, pointing toward adventure
